settings.title: Performance Mod
settings.description: CPU optimizations for storage and filter hotspots. Safe for singleplayer and multiplayer ACE saves.
settings.section_description: Conservative runtime tuning designed for Stonehearth ACE saves.
settings.performance_preset_description: Quick-start profile packs. Pick one and the mod tunes itself automatically.
settings.profile_description: Controls how aggressively the mod caches and coalesces filter queries. Safe is recommended for most players.

profiles.safe_description: Shortest cache windows, strictest fallbacks. Best starting point — nearly zero risk.
profiles.balanced_description: Moderate caching with strong safety limits. Good for mid-to-late game towns.
profiles.aggressive_description: Largest cache windows for maximum throughput. Use for big towns; monitor for issues.

presets.multiplayer_safe_description: Most conservative settings for shared servers. Minimizes any risk of desync or stalls.
presets.mega_town_stability_description: Maximum simulation stability for very large towns (30+ hearthlings, many items).
presets.singleplayer_throughput_description: Higher throughput for solo saves. Faster tick processing with safety fallbacks active.

settings.instrumentation_description: Publishes performance counters (cache hits, coalesces, health score) to the game profiler. Off by default — only needed for troubleshooting.
settings.discovery_description: Attempts to automatically find and hook additional filter-shaped functions. Off by default — leave off unless advised.
settings.long_ticks_only_description: When diagnostics are on, only log frames that exceed the long-tick threshold. Reduces log noise.
